kelly_inputs.note: From baseline_atm_vixiv.json RED-only results; update after spread sampling calibration

position_sizing.notes: Half-Kelly fraction applied to kelly_inputs above; risk_pct_per_trade is the premium budget per trade as fraction of equity

cost_model.note: Switch to 'fixed' after spread sampling calibration is complete

fixed_point.note: Generated by analyze_spread_samples.py after IG spread sampling

expiry_codes.note: Only SPXWED confirmed live. SPXFRI/SPXMON marked __UNCONFIRMED until the discovery probe finds them in a live session. Month-end Fridays may show as SPXEMO instead of SPXFRI.

ig_api.notes: Run collect_ig_spreads.py during a live Wed/Thu session to confirm SPXFRI. Run during a Mon/Tue session to confirm SPXWED. SPXFRI may appear as SPXEMO on month-end Fridays.
